# How To Play
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=How%20To%20Play&prop=wikitext

How to play? 

Revenge of the Fallen is a game developed in flash player, so to play it, you will first need to download Flash Player

Before playing, please read our rules over in the wiki or in the discord to prevent getting punished. ==> [https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/wiki/Rules Rules] <==

'''Don't have Flash Projector? Download it here!''' http://www.mediafire.com/file/61yyz8mjn63l3z1/flashplayer_18_sa.exe/file

To learn how to use Flash Projector, <u>follow this link</u>: https://gyazo.com/c7302ef62c46fee689fa8f4aa3a9496e

<em>You can also play on our Webclient, where you also find the lastest Flash Projector link: https://rotf.io/webclient.html</em>

'''Trouble connecting? Try these!''' 
* Go to Control Panel (Can be accessed by Windows key + R and typing in Control Panel>Flashplayer Settings>Advanced>Trusted Locations> https://rotf.io/ <- Paste the link in.
* Open port 2050 if its not already open Disable your Firewall.<code>.</code> Download the latest version OR a different version of Flash Projector. Try using a VPN (Virtual Private Network)
* Keep in mind that downloading the Client, will prevent you from joining, you need to follow the first link intructions.
